name: @angular-mf/nx
description: Nx Executors and Generators for Module Federation

scripts.build: tsup && cp src/executors.json ./ && cp src/generators.json ./ && mkdir -p dist/executors/application dist/executors/dev-server dist/generators/init && cp src/executors/application/*.json dist/executors/application/ && cp src/executors/dev-server/*.json dist/executors/dev-server/ && cp src/generators/init/*.json dist/generators/init/
